behaviors.raw:
on exitFrame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if not 1.soundBusy then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 200
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if not 1.soundBusy then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 140
    end if
  end if
end

on exitFrame

  end if
end

behaviors.raw:
global COPYRIGHTBILD

on mouseUp
  if (cast("suchen nach bildbeschreibung").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach Kuenstler").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach Copyright Inhalt").text contains "weiter") then
    resett()
    suchen(COPYRIGHTBILD, "COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD")
  else
    suchen(COPYRIGHTBILD, "COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD")
  end if
end

on mouseUp
  sprite(20).visible = 0
  puppetsetzen(1, 30, 0)
  puppetSound("shared.aif")
  play frame "glossar ex"
  go(1, "Aahaupt")
end

global COPYRIGHTINHALT

on mouseUp
  if (cast("suchen nach bildbeschreibung").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach Kuenstler").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD").text contains "weiter") then
    resett()
    suchen(COPYRIGHTINHALT, "Copyright INHALT")
  else
    suchen(COPYRIGHTINHALT, "Copyright INHALT")
  end if
end

global COPYRIGHTBILD, Bildbeschreibung

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  when keyDown then resett
  cast("Kün").text = line (sprite(20).movieTime + 1) of the text of cast "kuenstler a"
  cast("c inhalt").text = line (sprite(20).movieTime + 1) of the text of cast "COPYRIGHT INHALT"
  cast("bildb").text = line (sprite(20).movieTime + 1) of Bildbeschreibung
  cast("c foto").text = line (sprite(20).movieTime + 1) of COPYRIGHTBILD
  if rollover(25) then
    go("hilf")
    exit
  end if
end

on mouseDown
  repeat while the mouseDown
    sprite(20).movieTime = sprite(20).movieTime - 1
    updateStage()
  end repeat
end

on mouseDown
  repeat while the mouseDown
    sprite(20).movieTime = sprite(20).movieTime + 1
    updateStage()
  end repeat
end

global Bildbeschreibung

on mouseUp
  if (cast("Suchen nach Kuenstler").text contains "weiter") or (cast("Suchen nach COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach Copyright inhalt").text contains "weiter") then
    resett()
    suchen(Bildbeschreibung, "bildbeschreibung")
  else
    suchen(Bildbeschreibung, "bildbeschreibung")
  end if
end

global KUENSTLER

on mouseUp
  if (cast("suchen nach bildbeschreibung").text contains "weiter") or (cast("Suchen nach COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD").text contains "weiter") or (cast("suchen nach Copyright inhalt").text contains "weiter") then
    resett()
    suchen(KUENSTLER, "kuenstler")
  else
    suchen(KUENSTLER, "kuenstler")
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(25) then
    go("abb")
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus, a, Bildbeschreibung, COPYRIGHTBILD, KUENSTLER, COPYRIGHTINHALT
  if Linkmodus = "eins" then
    Tochtermovie1 = "Abbildungsnachweis"
  end if
  Moviestart()
  a = EMPTY
  KUENSTLER = cast("Kuenstler a").text
  Bildbeschreibung = cast("Bildbeschreibung a").text & RETURN & cast("Bildbeschreibung b").text
  COPYRIGHTBILD = cast("COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD A").text & RETURN & cast("COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD B").text
  COPYRIGHTINHALT = cast("COPYRIGHT INHALT").text
  setzen()
  cast("suchwort").text = "Neues Suchwort"
  set the selStart to 0
  set the selEnd to 14
end

on suchen suchort, klickfeld
  global a
  cursor(4)
  if (cast("suchwort").text contains "-") or (cast("suchwort").text contains "neues suchwort") or (cast("suchwort").text contains "?") or (cast("suchwort").text = EMPTY) then
    cursor(-1)
    cast("suchwort").text = "Neues Suchwort"
    set the selStart to 0
    set the selEnd to 14
    beep()
    exit
  end if
  if a = EMPTY then
    repeat with x = 1 to the number of lines in suchort
      if x = value(the number of lines in suchort) then
        a = EMPTY
        sprite(20).movieTime = 0
        setzen()
        cast("suchwort").text = "Neues Suchwort"
        set the selStart to 0
        set the selEnd to 14
        cursor(-1)
        beep()
        exit
      end if
      if line x of suchort contains line 1 of the text of cast "suchwort" then
        sprite(20).movieTime = x - 1
        a = x
        cast("Suchen nach" && klickfeld).text = "Weitersuchen"
        cursor(-1)
        exit
      end if
    end repeat
  else
    repeat with x = a + 1 to the number of lines in suchort
      if x = value(the number of lines in suchort) then
        a = EMPTY
        sprite(20).movieTime = 0
        setzen()
        cast("suchwort").text = "Neues Suchwort"
        set the selStart to 0
        set the selEnd to 14
        cursor(-1)
        beep()
        exit
      end if
      if line x of suchort contains line 1 of the text of cast "suchwort" then
        sprite(20).movieTime = x - 1
        a = x
        cursor(-1)
        exit
      end if
    end repeat
  end if
end

on resett
  global a
  a = EMPTY
  setzen()
  sprite(20).movieTime = 0
end

on setzen
  cast("Suchen nach Kuenstler").text = "Suchen"
  cast("Suchen nach Bildbeschreibung").text = "Suchen"
  cast("Suchen nach COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD").text = "Suchen"
  cast("Suchen nach Copyright INHALT").text = "Suchen"
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on musikkontrolle
end

on QTPAL
end

  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus
  if Linkmodus = "eins" then
    Tochtermovie1 = "Abbildungsnachweis"
  end if

end

end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, diskarchitekt, Augeverzweigung, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Felix#Augenfeld"
  Augeverzweigung = "Biografie"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskmovie = "Aubio"
  diskarchitekt = "au"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on stopMovie
  global Augeverzweigung
  Augeverzweigung = "biografie"
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  if the machineType = 256 then
    set the volume of sound 2 to 180
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 120
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe < 20) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 20) and (Aktualframe <= 180) then
      Grundmusik(180)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 180) and (Aktualframe <= 230) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 249) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe < 20) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 20) and (Aktualframe <= 180) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 180) and (Aktualframe <= 230) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 249) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Rudolf#Baumfeld"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ba"
  diskmovie = "Babio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(210)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Paul#Theodore#Frankl"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Fl"
  diskmovie = "Flbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 19) then
      Grundmusik(0)
    end if
    if (x >= 20) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 72) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 73) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 19) then
      Grundmusik(0)
    end if
    if (x >= 20) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 72) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 73) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on exitFrame
  global Mutterframe, Linkmodus
  menueleiste(0, 0, 0)
  if rollover(8) then
    set the cursor of sprite 8 to -1
  end if
  if rollover(9) then
    set the cursor of sprite 9 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if
  if rollover(10) then
    set the cursor of sprite 10 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if
  if rollover(11) then
    set the cursor of sprite 11 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if

    set the cursor of sprite 27 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if
  if rollover(29) then
    set the cursor of sprite 29 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if
  if rollover(30) then
    set the cursor of sprite 30 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  end if
  if not rollover(8) and not rollover(9) and not rollover(10) and not rollover(11) and not rollover(27) and not rollover(29) and not rollover(30) then
    set the cursor of sprite 8 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 9 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 10 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 11 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 27 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 29 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 30 to -1
  end if
  if rollover(27) and the mouseDown then
    Mutterframe = "Stellungnamen"
    Linkmodus = "eins"
    puppetSound("shared.aif")
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go(1, "CIAM")

    Mutterframe = "buchFrank"

    go(1, "CIAM")
  end if
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 61) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 150) and (Aktualframe <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 220) and (Aktualframe <= 329) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 330) and (Aktualframe <= 420) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 61) then
      Grundmusik(110)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 150) and (Aktualframe <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 220) and (Aktualframe <= 329) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 330) and (Aktualframe <= 420) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then

movie_scripts.raw:
on prepareMovie
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  puppetPalette(1)
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Gerhard#Karplus"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "ka"
  diskmovie = "Kabio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on stopMovie
  puppetPalette(0)
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  if the machineType = 256 then
    set the volume of sound 2 to 130
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 70
  end if
end

on QTPAL

  menueverdecken()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

  keineaktion()
end

  if the machineType = 256 then

  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 200
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 21) and (Aktualframe <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 70) and (Aktualframe <= 199) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 200) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 250) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 290) and (Aktualframe <= 309) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 261) and (Aktualframe <= 289) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 280) and (Aktualframe <= 289) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 251 then
      Lautmusik(190)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 260 then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 21) and (Aktualframe <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 70) and (Aktualframe <= 199) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 200) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 250) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 290) and (Aktualframe <= 309) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 261) and (Aktualframe <= 289) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 280) and (Aktualframe <= 289) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 251 then
      Lautmusik(140)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 260 then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Friedrich#Kiesler"
  Muttermovie = "New#York#1926-1931"
  diskarchitekt = "ki"
  diskmovie = "Kin2631"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 22) and (Aktualframe <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 132) and (Aktualframe <= 150) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 152) and (Aktualframe <= 330) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 332) and (Aktualframe <= 370) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 372) and (Aktualframe <= 440) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 441) and (Aktualframe <= 470) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 21 then
      Lautmusik(190)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 61 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 131 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 331 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 371 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 22) and (Aktualframe <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 132) and (Aktualframe <= 150) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 152) and (Aktualframe <= 330) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 332) and (Aktualframe <= 370) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 372) and (Aktualframe <= 440) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 441) and (Aktualframe <= 470) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 21 then
      Lautmusik(140)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 61 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 131 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 331 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 371 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
  end if
end

behaviors.raw:
on mouseUp
  global kieslerverzweigung
  if kieslerverzweigung = "ausstellungen" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("ausstellungen", "Kibio")
    exit
  end if
  if kieslerverzweigung = "architektur" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("architektur", "Kibio")
    exit
  end if
  if (kieslerverzweigung <> "architektur") and (kieslerverzweigung <> "ausstellungen") then
    puppetsetzen(7, 10, 0)
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("New#york#1931b", "Kin2631")
    exit
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  global spacetimeout
  go(the frame - 18)
  spacetimeout = spacetimeout + 1
  if spacetimeout > 5000 then
    go("ende")
    spacetimeout = 0
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  global kieslerverzweigung
  if kieslerverzweigung = "ausstellungen" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("ausstellungen", "Kibio")
    exit
  end if
  if kieslerverzweigung = "architektur" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("architektur", "Kibio")
    exit
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(3, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(10) then
    go("Mund")
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(3, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(8) then
    go("Mund")
  end if
  set the cursor of sprite 14 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 15 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 16 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 17 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 18 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 19 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 20 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(1, 0, 0)
  if rollover(9) then
    go("Text")
  end if
  if rollover(10) then
    go("plan")
  end if
  set the cursor of sprite 14 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 15 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 16 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 17 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 18 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 19 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 20 to -1
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Ernst#Lichtblau"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "li"
  diskmovie = "Libio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart, malcherframe
  malcherframe = "blatt#6"
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "fritz#Malcher"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ma"
  diskmovie = "Mabio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 140) and (Aktualframe <= 409) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 410) and (Aktualframe <= 441) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 450) and (Aktualframe <= 620) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 140) and (Aktualframe <= 409) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 410) and (Aktualframe <= 441) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 450) and (Aktualframe <= 620) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Richard#Neutra"
  Muttermovie = "Jugend#in#Wien"
  diskarchitekt = "Ne"
  diskmovie = "NeN1892"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 62) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 63) and (x <= 349) then
      Grundmusik(180)
    end if
    if (x >= 350) and (x <= 360) then
      Lautmusik(180)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 62) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 63) and (x <= 349) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 350) and (x <= 360) then
      Lautmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
end

  end if
  if volkerbundverzweigung = "schindler" then

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 122) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 123) and (x <= 310) then
      Grundmusik(180)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 122) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 123) and (x <= 310) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
end

end

  if 1.soundBusy then
  else

  end if
end

end

end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Bernard#Rudofsky"
  Muttermovie = "1905"

  menueverdecken()

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 30) and (Aktualframe <= 230) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 30) and (Aktualframe <= 230) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x >= 31) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x >= 140) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x >= 31) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x >= 140) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Rudolph#M.#Schindler"
  Muttermovie = "Jugend#in#wien"
  diskarchitekt = "Sc"
  diskmovie = "Scjugend"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if x = 31 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 90) and (x <= 190) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if x = 191 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 192) and (x <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if x = 31 then
      Lautmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 90) and (x <= 190) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if x = 191 then
      Lautmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 192) and (x <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Simon#Schmiderer"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Sm"
  diskmovie = "Smbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 30) and (x <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (x >= 150) and (x <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 220) and (x <= 394) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if (x >= 30) and (x <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(110)
    end if
    if (x >= 150) and (x <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 220) and (x <= 394) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Walter#Sobotka"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "So"
  diskmovie = "Sobio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 159) then
      Grundmusik(180)
    end if
    if (x >= 160) and (x <= 209) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 159) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 160) and (x <= 209) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
  end if
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Anton#Tedesko"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"

  diskmovie = "Tebio"
  blinkzahl = 0

  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if x = 111 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 112) and (x <= 281) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (x > 281) and (x <= 321) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 256
    end if
    if (x > 321) and (x <= 370) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 220
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if x = 111 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 112) and (x <= 281) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if (x > 281) and (x <= 321) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 256
    end if
    if (x > 321) and (x <= 370) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 150
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Joseph#Urban"
  Muttermovie = "Palast#der#Sowjets"
  diskarchitekt = "ur"
  diskmovie = "Urpala"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 100) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 102) and (Aktualframe <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 122) and (Aktualframe <= 179) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 180) and (Aktualframe <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 61 then
      Lautmusik(150)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(150)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 121 then
      Lautmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(40)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 62) and (Aktualframe <= 100) then
      Grundmusik(40)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 102) and (Aktualframe <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(40)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 122) and (Aktualframe <= 179) then
      Grundmusik(40)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 180) and (Aktualframe <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 61 then
      Lautmusik(100)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(100)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 121 then
      Lautmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Hans#Adolf#Vetter"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ve"
  diskmovie = "Vebio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x = 114) or (x = 115) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 250
      exit
    else
      set the volume of sound 2 to 150
      exit
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x = 114) or (x = 115) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 200
      exit
    else
      set the volume of sound 2 to 100
      exit
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart, wlachverzweigung
  wlachverzweigung = EMPTY
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Oskar#Wlach"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Wl"
  diskmovie = "Wlbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 21) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 22) and (x <= 39) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (x >= 40) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 61) and (x <= 99) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 100) and (x <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if x = 121 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 21) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 22) and (x <= 39) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 40) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 61) and (x <= 99) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 100) and (x <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if x = 121 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus
  if Linkmodus = "eins" then
    Tochtermovie1 = "ZEITlich"
  end if
  Moviestart()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on musikkontrolle
  if the machineType = 256 then
    set the volume of sound 2 to 200
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 150
  end if
end

behaviors.raw:
on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if rollover(6) then
    go("follis")
  end if
  set the cursor of sprite 5 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
  set the cursor of sprite 7 to [member("maus"), member("raus")]
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(5) then
    go("zwei")
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if rollover(5) then
    go("anna")
  end if
  if rollover(6) then
    go("shows")
  end if
  set the cursor of sprite 5 to -1
  set the cursor of sprite 7 to -1
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(6) then
    go("zwei")
  end if
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(5, 0, 0)
  if not rollover(6) then
    go("drei")
  end if
end
